title: Route Distance System
description: Implement the route distance limitation system. Each turn (week/month) has a maximum travel distance. Having headquarters in cities extends available range. Fresh horse purchase option at stations for additional upkeep. Road quality affects travel distance (better roads = more distance per unit).
definition-of-done: Distance limit enforced per turn. HQ placement extends range. Fresh horse stations work. Road quality modifies distance. All displayed in HUD.
testing-plan: Test distance limits. Verify HQ range extension. Test fresh horse purchase. Confirm road quality effects.
todos: Implement base distance limit per turn
unknowns: Fresh horse cost and distance bonus
